title: 🍷🤍 A Privacy-First Cultural Gift: Building `kingdom.lat/up` in 18 Hours (Solo, No Team, No Tracking)
content:
# 🍷🤍 A Privacy-First Cultural Gift: Building `kingdom.lat/up` in 18 Hours (Solo, No Team, No Tracking) > *"What if a website could respect your time, your privacy, and your curiosity — all at once?"* **To the lovers of culture:** From the quiet forests of the **Nordic** lands, Through the resilient mountains of the **Balkans**, Along the whispering shores of the **Baltic**, Across the open horizons of the **Netherlands**, Into the poetic soul of **Ireland**, Through the enduring memory of **Poland**, To the delicate beauty of **Japan**, And the heartfelt warmth of **Belgium** and all of **Europe**… If you seek **purity** in a noisy digital world, If you value **privacy** as a human right, not a feature, If you believe culture should be shared — not tracked, not sold, not exploited… **This is for you.** 🕊️ I built this small project alone, in about **18 hours**, as a quiet gift to cultural explorers around the world: 🪷 **[kingdom.lat/up](https://www.kingdom.lat/up/up.html)** --- ## 🎁 The Vision: Culture + Privacy, Not Culture vs. Privacy In an age where "free" often means "your data is the product", I asked myself a simple question: > *Can we build a truly free, culturally rich web experience — with zero tracking, zero ads, zero compromise?* The answer is **yes**. And here's how. --- ## 🌊🐟 What the Site Offers (100% Free, 100% Client-Side) | Feature | How It Works | |---------|--------------| | 🔊 **Listen to Chapters** | Native Web Speech API. No external servers. Voice runs entirely in your browser. | | 🕊️ **Extract Text from Images** | Local OCR via Tesseract.js. Your image is processed in-memory. It never leaves your device. | | 😁🍻 **Save Text as .txt** | Pure client-side file generation. No backend, no logs, no waiting. | | 🗻 **Cultural Gateways Gallery** | Dynamic cards loaded from `up.json` & `up1.json`. Easy to extend, zero tracking. | | 💞 **Two-Color Design** | Navy `#0A192F` + Snow `#F8F9FA`. Calm, fast, accessible, and free of visual noise. | --- ## 🍷🤍 The Promise: What We *Don't* Do ```plaintext ❌ No cookies ❌ No analytics ❌ No ads (real or disguised) ❌ No user registration ❌ No cloud processing ❌ No deception ✅ 100% client-side ✅ 100% free forever ✅ 100% respectful of your attention ``` > *"Your images stay on your device. No cloud. I built this with respect for your privacy."* --- ## 🧑‍💻 The Build: Solo, Simple, Transparent | Detail | Value | |--------|-------| | **Developer** | One person (no team, no funding, no agency) | | **Time** | ~18 hours (from concept to live deployment) | | **Stack** | Pure HTML, CSS, JavaScript + Tesseract.js (WebAssembly) | | **Hosting** | GitHub + Vercel (static, global, free tier) | | **Philosophy** | "Minimum code, maximum respect" | No heavy frameworks. No build steps. No complexity. Just clean, readable files that do one thing well. --- ## 🎁 A Network of Cultural Doors This page is part of a small, interconnected network of cultural projects, all sharing the same ethos: - 👑 [kingdom.lat](https://www.kingdom.lat) — Cultural archives & poetic history - 🚪 [doors.mom](https://www.doors.mom) — Stories from Nordic, Balkan, Baltic, Irish, Polish, Dutch cultures - 🧊 [2026.lat](https://www.2026.lat) — Privacy as art: hide & extract text inside images - 🌊 [rivo.lat](https://www.rivo.lat) — Six cultures, one flowing river of heritage - 🌿 [rrr.mom](https://www.rrr.mom) — Roots • Resonance • Reverence Each site follows the same principles: **simple, private, respectful, free**. --- ## 🌷 Why Share This on Dev.to? 1. **To inspire**: You don't need a team, funding, or complexity to build something meaningful. 2. **To advocate**: Privacy-first design is not a "nice-to-have" feature — it's a foundational promise. 3. **To connect**: If you're building culturally respectful tools, I'd love to learn from your journey. 4. **To give**: This project is a gift. Use it, share it, fork it — no permission needed. --- ## 🎀 Try It Yourself 1. Visit: [kingdom.lat/up](https://www.kingdom.lat/up/up.html) 2. Click `📤 UPLOAD IMAGE FOR TEXT EXTRACTION` 3. Choose any image with text — watch it process **locally**, in your browser 4. Listen to a chapter, save text, or explore the cultural gateways 5. Open DevTools → Network tab → see **zero external requests** (after initial load) > 🕊️ *No tracking. No tricks. Just a quiet space for culture and curiosity.* --- ## 🤝 Let's Build a Kinder Web If this resonates with you: - 🌟 Share it with someone who values privacy & culture - 💬 Comment below: What would *you* add to a privacy-first cultural site? - 🕊️ Or simply: use it, enjoy it, pass it on > *"In a world that sells attention, sometimes the most radical act is to give respect — freely, quietly, without asking for anything back."* --

🇯🇵 静寂の中で育まれた文化のように、このサイトは静かに、しかし確かにあなたを尊重します。

🇩🇪 Wie die Kulturen, die in der Stille gewachsen sind, respektiert diese Website Sie leise, aber gewiss.

🇳🇱 Zoals de culturen die groeiden in de stilte, respecteert deze website je stil, maar zeker.

🇫🇷 Comme les cultures qui ont grandi dans le silence, ce site vous respecte silencieusement, mais sûrement.

🇵🇹 Como as culturas que cresceram no silêncio, este site respeita você silenciosamente, mas com certeza.

🇫🇴 Soos mentanin í stilluleika vaksu, virðir hesin síða tygum stilt, men vist.

🇮🇸 Eins og menningin sem óx í kyrrðinni, virðir þessi síða þig hljóðlega, en víst.

🇮🇹 Come le culture cresciute nel silenzio, questo sito ti rispetta silenziosamente, ma con certezza.

🇳🇴 Som kulturene som vokste i stillheten, respekterer denne nettsiden deg stille, men sikkert.

🇸🇪 Som kulturerna som växte i tystnaden, respekterar denna webbplats dig tyst, men säkert.

🇩🇰 Som kulturerne, der voksede i stilheden, respekterer denne hjemmeside dig stille, men sikkert.

🇫🇮 Kuten hiljaisuudessa kasvaneet kulttuurit, tämä sivusto kunnioittaa sinua hiljaa, mutta varmasti.

🧊🧊🧊🤍🍷🍻 **Tags**: `#privacy` `#culture` `#webdev` `#javascript` `#opensource` `#frontend` `#ethics` `#staticweb` `#nordic` `#balkan` **Mastodon**: [@worldday@mastodon.social](https://mastodon.social/@worldday) **Project**: [kingdom.lat/up](https://www.kingdom.lat/up/up.html) 🧊 *Built with respect, for every visitor.*
